name: kimai-character-reference
purpose: Stable project-local KimAI character reference for future generated deck images.
styleSummary: Flat hand-drawn black line art on white background with one blue accent (#2563eb), cute Korean office AI assistant, headset antenna, blue tie, name badge.

files.use: Front, three-quarter, side, and back character proportions.
Expressions, face shape, headset, antenna, tie, badge, laptop, checklist, document props.
Slide-ready desk, document, checklist, standing, and presenting poses.

textPolicy: Use these images for character and style consistency only. Do not trust generated in-image text as source of truth. Exact Korean and English slide text should be rendered separately or composited locally.
